data.narrative:
Primer AI is a Series D-stage defense and security software company that has raised $237M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer set of 4 same-stage, same-sector private companies (Helsing, Saronic, Chaos Industries, Onebrief) with valuations ranging from $2.1B to $18.0B, supplemented by 2 public comparables and additional private benchmarks including Anduril Industries.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $237M in total raised as a proxy baseline and applies a 1.5x multiplier typical of Series D progression, yielding $356M. Peer-median analysis takes the median valuation across the 4 same-stage, same-sector peers of $6.9B. These methods produce substantially different results, reflecting the wide dispersion within the defense tech peer set ($2.1B to $18.0B).

The triangulated analysis produces a range of $302M to $7.9B, with a median of $3.6B. The wide spread reflects material uncertainty about how Primer AI's stage, product maturity, revenue traction, and defensibility compare relative to Helsing (the high outlier at $18.0B) versus more modestly valued peers like Onebrief ($2.1B). Narrowing this range would require visibility into customer concentration, gross margins, and pipeline quality relative to the peer cohort.
